sections.paragraph:
Original: זמר

Transliteration: zemer

Phonetic: zeh'-mer

BDB Definition:

  1. mountain sheep, mountain goat, moufflon, gazelle, chamois (meaning uncertain)
    1. a certain animal allowed as food (specific species uncertain)
    2. perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

Origin: apparently from H2167 or H2168

TWOT entry: 560b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
